g.text: D. Total wall-clock time for 100 steps

text.style: font-size: 9px; font-family: 'DejaVu Sans', 'Bitstream Vera Sans', 'Computer Modern Sans Serif', 'Lucida Grande', 'Verdana', 'Geneva', 'Lucid', 'Arial', 'Helvetica', 'Avant Garde', sans-serif; text-anchor: start

g.text: The CNF-style solver-in-the-loop proxy rolls out the learned ODE before evaluating the loss, requiring 16 velocity evaluations per step in this quick run. This is a training-control-flow bottleneck, not a full likelihood CNF benchmark.
